scene.setting: a dark, rocky landscape at night.

key_actions: the camera focuses on a large, dark, monstrous figure moving forward, then pans out to show a massive army of dark figures charging forward.
visual_objective.visibility_notes: The scene is extremely dark, with the figures mostly appearing as silhouettes against the dark background.

audio_description: The roaring and crowd sounds continue, now joined by a deep, guttural roar from the monstrous figure.
